Package org.apache.juneau.marshall.ini

package org.apache.juneau.marshall.ini
INI format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.

INI is a classic configuration file format with sections ([sectionName]) and key-value pairs. Beans map to INI with simple properties as key-value pairs and nested beans as named sections.

Usage:

String ini = IniSerializer.DEFAULT.serialize(myBean); MyBean bean = IniParser.DEFAULT.parse(ini, MyBean.class); // Or use the marshaller: String ini = Ini.of(myBean); MyBean bean = Ini.to(ini, MyBean.class);

See Also:
  • INI Basics

    Package
    Description
    org.apache.juneau.marshall
    Marshalling API
  • Class
    Description
    Ini
    Annotation for customizing INI serialization and parsing behavior on classes, methods, and fields.
    IniAnnotation
    Utility classes and methods for the @Ini annotation.
    IniApply
    Dynamically applies a @Ini annotation to specified classes, methods, or fields.
    IniApply.Array
    A collection of @IniApply annotations.
    IniApplyAnnotation
    Utility classes and methods for the @IniApply annotation.
    IniApplyAnnotation.Applier
    Applies targeted IniApply annotations to a Context.Builder.
    IniApplyAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    IniBeanPropertyMeta
    Metadata on bean properties specific to INI serializers and parsers, from @Ini.
    IniClassMeta
    Metadata on classes specific to INI serializers and parsers, from @Ini.
    IniConfig
    Annotation for specifying config properties defined in IniSerializer and IniParser.
    IniConfigAnnotation
    Utility classes and methods for the @IniConfig annotation.
    IniConfigAnnotation.ParserApply
    Applies IniConfig annotations to an IniParser.Builder.
    IniConfigAnnotation.SerializerApply
    Applies IniConfig annotations to an IniSerializer.Builder.
    IniMetaProvider
    Interface for providing access to IniClassMeta and IniBeanPropertyMeta objects.
    IniParser
    Parses INI-formatted text into POJO models.
    IniParser.Builder
    Builder for IniParser.
    IniParserSession
    Session for parsing INI format into POJOs.
    IniParserSession.Builder
    Builder for INI parser session.
    IniSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to INI format.
    IniSerializer.Builder
    Builder class.
    IniSerializerSession
    Session for serializing objects to INI format.
    IniSerializerSession.Builder
    Builder for INI serializer session.
    IniWriter
    Specialized writer for serializing INI format.
